statistical_metrics.defect_morphology_notes: 58.09 um scale verified. Known-omission recall 87/92; 630 non-design missing/broken calls. Missing mask covers 29.2% of CAD and 34.5% lies on its one-voxel outer layer (below the 75% drift gate). 0/722 sphericity values are nonphysical. An excess mask exists (301338 voxels), but has no per-strut association; bent and inflated classifications are absent.
